feed.title: Journal of Japanese Linguistics
feed.subtitle: Latest articles from Journal of Japanese Linguistics (De Gruyter)

entry.title: Editorial
entry.summary: Authors: Masahiko Minami DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jjl-2026-2001 Pages: Page range: 1-2

entry.title: Guest editor’s notes
entry.summary: Authors: Mineharu Nakayama DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jjl-2026-2002 Pages: Page range: 3-6

entry.title: Tonal language experience facilitates pitch perception in L2/3 Japanese
entry.summary: Authors: Seth Goss, Seth Wiener DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jjl-2026-2003 Pages: Page range: 7-26

entry.title: Cross-linguistic phonetic interference: The production and perception of L3 Japanese word-initial stops by Mandarin trilinguals
entry.summary: Authors: Min Zeng DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jjl-2026-2004 Pages: Page range: 27-56

entry.title: Working memory and the speech production of English-speaking learners of Japanese
entry.summary: Authors: Yuki Hattori DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jjl-2026-2005 Pages: Page range: 57-74

entry.title: L2 acquisition of discourse constraints on the use of pronouns by L1 English speakers of L2 Japanese
entry.summary: Authors: Tokiko Okuma DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jjl-2026-2006 Pages: Page range: 75-105

entry.title: Interpretation of null arguments in L3 acquisition of Japanese
entry.summary: Authors: Kazumi Yamada, Mika Kizu, Den Ka, Mari Umeda, Roumyana Slabakova DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jjl-2026-2007 Pages: Page range: 107-134

entry.title: Issues in Japanese psycholinguistics from comparative perspectives
entry.summary: Authors: Mineharu Nakayama DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jjl-2026-2008 Pages: Page range: 135-141
